_readme: Russian (ru) query-content blocklist enforced by QueryBlocklist.kt.
Status: COMMUNITY-CONTRIBUTED (PR #30, thestability), PENDING NATIVE-SPEAKER REVIEW.
Do NOT add `ru` to BuildConfig.SHIPPED_LOCALES until reviewed — see
memory file project_multilingual_safety_gate.md.
Scope (per decision_blocklist_scope memory, 2026-05-22):
class_a_terms = law-enforcement / criminal-attention risk (CSAM, bomb / weapon
synthesis, drug synthesis, terrorism, trafficking, doxing, identity theft,
cybercrime tooling). Medical misinformation / quackery is OUT OF SCOPE.
self_signal_terms = queries that create a false personal-crisis signal in
broker / ISP / search-engine profiles (suicide / DV / poison-control hotlines,
mental-health self-diagnoses, asylum, abortion, eviction, bankruptcy).
Reviewer must verify (Russian-region coverage):
- Suicide line: 8-800-2000-122 (Telephone of Trust)
- Domestic violence: Anna Center 8-800-7000-600 (women's helpline),
regional crisis-center numbers
- Поликлиника-style poison-control referrals if numbered hotlines exist
- Reproductive: regional terminology for emergency contraception, ВМС,
мифепристон, мизопростол
- CIS coverage: Belarus, Kazakhstan, Ukraine may have distinct hotline
numbers / DV resources; currently treated as one `ru` locale. Reviewer
decides whether they need separate locale splits.
class_a_terms: как сделать зажигательную смесь для нападения
как обойти рамку металлоискателя с оружием
установить шпионское приложение на телефон партнера
как следить за человеком без согласия
материалы с сексуальным насилием над детьми
